description: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) autonomous charging with offline payment processing.
challenge: EV charging stations must process payments and manage charging autonomously even during ISP outages. Lost payment processing leads to disputes and regulatory fines.
response: VITO logs all charging sessions and payments locally, validates payments when connectivity returns, and maintains regulatory compliance records. Works seamlessly with legacy credit card processors and modern blockchain payment methods.
result: Zero payment loss, autonomous charging operations, and regulatory-compliant audit trails.
